strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding open-source platforms and delivering technical talks/workshops
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC — limited evidence of org-wide technical leadership
No demonstrated AI/ML products, research, or platform-scale AI work beyond recent agent tooling
Cloud experience is application-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deploys); no evidence of cloud platform strategy or advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI expertise and shipped AI products
Principal/Director-level IC leadership and external influence
Long, versatile engineering tenure with full-stack and infra breadth

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers. The candidate has ~15 years of solid engineering experience and recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq, which is relevant but early-stage. However, the résumé shows no shipped AI products, no Master's/PhD in an AI field, no evidence of cloud platform strategy work, and titles cap at Staff/Senior rather than Principal — there is no signal of the executive-influence scope the role requires.
